brief_summary: Four-layer Topre stack cross-section. Top to bottom: (1) slider engaging MX-compatible stem, (2) rubber dome moulded into a sheet (with bordeaux note 'NOT the sensor'), (3) conical spring with bottom coil bordeaux-emphasized, (4) capacitive PCB pad as a bordeaux circular trace. Numbered margin callouts on the left. Right-margin callout 'no make, no break / a number that crosses a threshold'.
data_sources: topre-electrocapacitive-deep-dive.mdx § 'The architecture, precisely' — 'A Topre key position has four parts stacked vertically. At the bottom is the PCB, with a printed circular trace at every key position that functions as one plate of a capacitor. Sitting on the PCB at each position is a small conical spring ... Above the spring is a rubber dome ... Above the dome is a plastic slider that engages a standard MX-compatible stem.'
